ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time interval entry */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* The time interval for which the data is recorded */,
  "average_delay" REAL /* Average delay in minutes during the interval */,
  "average_stops" REAL /* Average number of stops recorded during the interval */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed in miles per hour during the interval */,
  "average_delay_stopped" REAL /* Average delay when the vehicle is stopped during the interval */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data is collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the interval */,
  "special_events" TEXT /* Special events that may affect traffic */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES traffic_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic data source (e.g., Traffic Camera, GPS) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the traffic data collection source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the data source */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, planner, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed or downloaded in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES traffic_data ("interval_id")
)
